'''鈭歷-sh-zh''' ('''vashazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:naughty|naughty]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:naughty|naughty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-sh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| vashazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vashazhithi|vashazhithi]] || [[word:vashazhiji|vashazhiji]] || [[word:vashazhishi|vashazhishi]] || [[word:vashazhi|vashazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vashazhuthuth|vashazhuthuth]] || [[word:vashazhujuj|vashazhujuj]] || [[word:vashazhushush|vashazhushush]] || [[word:vashazh|vashazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vashazhuthu|vashazhuthu]] || [[word:vashazhuju|vashazhuju]] || [[word:vashazhushu|vashazhushu]] || [[word:vashazhu|vashazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vashazhufuth|vashazhufuth]] || [[word:vashazhufuj|vashazhufuj]] || [[word:vashazhufush|vashazhufush]] || [[word:vashazhuf|vashazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vashazhethe|vashazhethe]] || [[word:vashazheje|vashazheje]] || [[word:vashazheshe|vashazheshe]] || [[word:vashazhe|vashazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vashazhothoth|vashazhothoth]] || [[word:vashazhojoj|vashazhojoj]] || [[word:vashazhoshosh|vashazhoshosh]] || [[word:vashazh|vashazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vashazhotho|vashazhotho]] || [[word:vashazhojo|vashazhojo]] || [[word:vashazhosho|vashazhosho]] || [[word:vashazho|vashazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vashazhofoth|vashazhofoth]] || [[word:vashazhofoj|vashazhofoj]] || [[word:vashazhofosh|vashazhofosh]] || [[word:vashazhof|vashazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vashazh忙th忙|vashazh忙th忙]] || [[word:vashazh忙j忙|vashazh忙j忙]] || [[word:vashazh忙sh忙|vashazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:vashazh忙|vashazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vashazhathath|vashazhathath]] || [[word:vashazhajaj|vashazhajaj]] || [[word:vashazhashash|vashazhashash]] || [[word:vashazh|vashazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vashazhatha|vashazhatha]] || [[word:vashazhaja|vashazhaja]] || [[word:vashazhasha|vashazhasha]] || [[word:vashazha|vashazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vashazhafath|vashazhafath]] || [[word:vashazhafaj|vashazhafaj]] || [[word:vashazhafash|vashazhafash]] || [[word:vashazhaf|vashazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:vashazhasha|vashazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govashazhasha|govashazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivashazhasha|gokivashazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:vashazhn眉sha|vashazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govashazhnkn眉sha|govashazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivashazhn眉sha|gokivashazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vashazhsh毛sha|vashazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govashazhnksh毛sha|govashazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivashazhsh毛sha|gokivashazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vashazhrosha|vashazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govashazhnkrosha|govashazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivashazhrosha|gokivashazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vashazhmusha|vashazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govashazhnkmusha|govashazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivashazhmusha|gokivashazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:vashazhsherasha|vashazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govashazhnksherasha|govashazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivashazhsherasha|gokivashazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:vashazhngasha|vashazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govashazhnkngasha|govashazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivashazhngasha|gokivashazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vashazhyasha|vashazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govashazhnkyasha|govashazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivashazhyasha|gokivashazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:vashazhyamasha|vashazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govashazhnkyamasha|govashazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivashazhyamasha|gokivashazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:vashazhn眉sh毛sha|vashazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govashazhnkn眉sh毛sha|govashazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivashazhn眉sh毛sha|gokivashazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vashazhn眉rosha|vashazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govashazhnkn眉rosha|govashazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivashazhn眉rosha|gokivashazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vashazhn眉musha|vashazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govashazhnkn眉musha|govashazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivashazhn眉musha|gokivashazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:vashazhsh毛n眉sha|vashazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govashazhnksh毛n眉sha|govashazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivashazhsh毛n眉sha|gokivashazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vashazhsh毛rosha|vashazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govashazhnksh毛rosha|govashazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivashazhsh毛rosha|gokivashazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vashazhsh毛musha|vashazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govashazhnksh毛musha|govashazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivashazhsh毛musha|gokivashazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:vashazhron眉sha|vashazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govashazhnkron眉sha|govashazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivashazhron眉sha|gokivashazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:vashazhrosh毛sha|vashazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govashazhnkrosh毛sha|govashazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivashazhrosh毛sha|gokivashazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vashazhromusha|vashazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govashazhnkromusha|govashazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivashazhromusha|gokivashazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:vashazhmun眉sha|vashazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govashazhnkmun眉sha|govashazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivashazhmun眉sha|gokivashazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:vashazhmush毛sha|vashazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govashazhnkmush毛sha|govashazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivashazhmush毛sha|gokivashazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vashazhmurosha|vashazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govashazhnkmurosha|govashazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivashazhmurosha|gokivashazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:vashazh|vashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:v忙sh忙zh|v忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovashazh|hovashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hov忙sh忙zh|hov忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovashazh|hohovashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohov忙sh忙zh|hohov忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉vashazh|n眉vashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉v忙sh忙zh|n眉v忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉vashazh|n眉n眉vashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉v忙sh忙zh|n眉n眉v忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂vashazh|n茂vashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂v忙sh忙zh|n茂v忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂vashazh|n茂n茂vashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂v忙sh忙zh|n茂n茂v忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvashazh|luvashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luv忙sh忙zh|luv忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvashazh|luluvashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluv忙sh忙zh|luluv忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livashazh|livashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liv忙sh忙zh|liv忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivashazh|lilivashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliv忙sh忙zh|liliv忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovashazh|kovashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kov忙sh忙zh|kov忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovashazh|kokovashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokov忙sh忙zh|kokov忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevashazh|kevashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kev忙sh忙zh|kev忙sh忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevashazh|kekevashazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekev忙sh忙zh|kekev忙sh忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
